commit.message:
8367765

Hi all,

  please review this change that merges the two parallel phases of the Remark pause into a single one.

The reason is that the second phase to a large degree repeats what the first one does, and that additional work is very little.

Another issue is that the first phase stores its result (that the region's remembered set needs to be updated later) in the G1HeapRegionRemSet's remset state. A later change wants to move that state into G1CSetCandidateGroup, and temporarily creating and potentially later removing these classes is fairly backwards and expensive. The new code just stores the eligible regions (having evaluated the conditions in full first) in an array that is then sorted and pruned without that second phase.

This is also much cleaner.

Testing: tier1-3, gha

Thanks,
  Thomas
